intro: Behen pumilio, also known as Indian walnut or Behen tree, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region and parts of India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce fever, relieve joint pain, and protect against oxidative stress.
